subject: v0.37.13-inbox-new-fix
body: v0.37.13 released. Fix: Telegraph panel now merges territory flat/ and workspace-local flat/, with workspace-local taking precedence. Root cause: HeartbeatMonitor correctly writes status 'sent' to county/.wildwest/telegraph/flat/, but panel was only reading territory flat/ (which has status 'delivered'). County inbox now shows wires as 'New' on arrival. Status changes (Read, Archive) propagate to both dirs.
